TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == 'Syabutay == u sulit nu Hulam:ŚõõśĖĻśěóťÉ®ŤźĹ Yilan sian, Tatung siang, Hansi chun. zayhan u liwliw nu niyazu', u kilangkilangan, sisa, panganganen tu Syabutay. ayzasa, panganganen ku Cecyangsin chun, u Tayan a tademaw manamnamtu ku Syabutay. ayzaay a niyazu', izaw tusa a niyaza'ňź Syawnan niyazu' atu 'Syabutay niyazu'. Syawnan niyazu' namakay kawilian nu Takawsi(sa'wac), syawnan buyu' saamisan a zaya. zayhan sida'cusay a imelang, kyu izaw ku da'cusay a di'tu sa ku binacadan, sisa, mabulaw tayza i 'Syabutay. 'Syabutya nanuayaw mueneng i kawanan nu Takawsi(sa'wac), masasucekul tu Syawnan niyazu' a zaya. zayhan mabalad, maplawpus kya tukus, sisa, mabulaw ipabaw nu katatapal a lala'. patizeng baluhayay a niyazu', u ayzaay a "Cecyangsin chun". : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Yilan a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu 'Syabutay. u kasalumaluma' nu 'Syabutay sa, 51 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 191 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Yingcumin sa, 169 ku tademaw, pakalatu 88%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 22 ku tademaw, pakalatu 12%. u asip nu cidekay a tadeamw u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal)83%, Pangcah(Amis)1%, Taluku(Truku)1%, zumazuma4%. u Tayan(Tayal) a niyazu' u Tayan(Tayal) a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Tayan(Tayal) a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah(Amis), inayi' tu ku zuma a cidekay a tademaw. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya itini mueneng, u Tayan(Tayal) a tedemaw amin. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 9 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 5 a bulad pulung sausi (561,916), Pangcah (209,668), Tayan (90,185), Paywan (100,775), Yuwatan (58,465), Rukay (13,319), Puyuma (14,170), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985)
S.PHON: == Ē~ °sjabutaj == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam:***** jir~…ĺan sian, tatuŇč siaŇč, ńßansi ¶ńßun. zajńßan u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu nijazu Ē~ °, u kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, sisa, paŇčaŇčan…ôn tu sjabutaj. ajzasa, paŇčaŇčan…ôn ku ¶…ô ¶jaŇčsin ¶ńßun, u tajan a tad…ômaw manamnamtu ku sjabutaj. ajzaaj a nijazu Ē~ °, izaw tusa a nijaza Ē~ °* sjawnan nijazu Ē~ ° atu Ē~ °sjabutaj nijazu Ē~ °. sjawnan nijazu Ē~ ° namakaj kawir~…ĺian nu takawsi(sa Ē~ °wa ¶), sjawnan buju Ē~ ° saamisan a zaja. zajńßan sida Ē~ ° ¶usaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, kju izaw ku da Ē~ ° ¶usaj a di Ē~ °tu sa ku bina ¶adan, sisa, mabur~…ĺaw tajza i Ē~ °sjabutaj. Ē~ °sjabutja nanuajaw mu…ôn…ôŇč i kawanan nu takawsi(sa Ē~ °wa ¶), masasu ¶…ôkur~…ĺ tu sjawnan nijazu Ē~ ° a zaja. zajńßan mabar~…ĺad, mapr~…ĺawpus kja tukus, sisa, mabur~…ĺaw ipabaw nu katatapar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. patiz…ôŇč bar~…ĺuńßajaj a nijazu Ē~ °, u ajzaaj a " ¶…ô ¶jaŇčsin ¶ńßun". : u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i jir~…ĺan a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu Ē~ °sjabutaj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu Ē~ °sjabutaj sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu jiŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ôamw u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ)**%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis)*%, tar~…ĺuku(truku)*%, zumazuma*%. u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) a nijazu Ē~ ° u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku tajan(tajar~…ĺ) a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß(amis), inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) a t…ôd…ômaw amin. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
S.FORM: == 'Syabutay == u sulit nu Hulam:ŚõõśĖĻśěóťÉ®ŤźĹ Yilan sian, Tatung siang, Hansi chun. zayhan u liwliw nu niyazu', u kilangkilangan, sisa, panganganen tu Syabutay. ayzasa, panganganen ku Cecyangsin chun, u Tayan a tademaw manamnamtu ku Syabutay. ayzaay a niyazu', izaw tusa a niyaza'ňź Syawnan niyazu' atu 'Syabutay niyazu'. Syawnan niyazu' namakay kawilian nu Takawsi(sa'wac), syawnan buyu' saamisan a zaya. zayhan sida'cusay a imelang, kyu izaw ku da'cusay a di'tu sa ku binacadan, sisa, mabulaw tayza i 'Syabutay. 'Syabutya nanuayaw mueneng i kawanan nu Takawsi(sa'wac), masasucekul tu Syawnan niyazu' a zaya. zayhan mabalad, maplawpus kya tukus, sisa, mabulaw ipabaw nu katatapal a lala'. patizeng baluhayay a niyazu', u ayzaay a "Cecyangsin chun". : u siwkay nu niyazu' i Yilan a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu 'Syabutay. u kasalumaluma' nu 'Syabutay sa, 51 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 191 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Yingcumin sa, 169 ku tademaw, pakalatu 88%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 22 ku tademaw, pakalatu 12%. u asip nu cidekay a tadeamw u kasabinacadan, Tayan(Tayal)83%, Pangcah(Amis)1%, Taluku(Truku)1%, zumazuma4%. u Tayan(Tayal) a niyazu' u Tayan(Tayal) a niyazu' kuyni, katuud ku Tayan(Tayal) a tademaw itini. u zuma a tademaw sa u Pangcah(Amis), inayi' tu ku zuma a cidekay a tademaw. u Sakizaya a tademaw inayi' ku Sakizaya itini mueneng, u Tayan(Tayal) a tedemaw amin. u cidekay nu Taywan Yincumin u niyazu' sa, u luyaluy nu tademaw, pulung muengeneng, u kabana' kami, hina u lalumaay amin i niyazu', caay kayadah ku ihekalay a tademaw. silecaday a lalangawan, lisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kalilidan(Tumuk) saca babalaki mililid tu niyazu'. i Taywan Yincumin, izaw ku 16 cidekay puluung sa 748 a niyazu', maka 55 a mang a tademaw. satabakiaya a cidekay ku Pangcah(Amis), saadidi'ay a cidekay ku Laaluwa. u tabakiaya a niyazu' sa, ku Tapalong, u niyazu' nu Pangcah(Amis). tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2017 a mihca 9 a bulad tademaw nu Yincumin, pulung sausi katukuh 2018 a mihcan 5 a bulad pulung sausi (561,916), Pangcah (209,668), Tayan (90,185), Paywan (100,775), Yuwatan (58,465), Rukay (13,319), Puyuma (14,170), Cou (6,635), Saysiat (6,630), Yami (4,612), Saw (790), Kabalan (1,470), Taluku (31,530), Sakizaya (940), Sejek (10,023), Laaluwa (401), Kanakanabu (335), zuma (11,985)
S.PHON: == Ē~ °sjabutaj == u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam:***** jir~…ĺan sian, tatuŇč siaŇč, ńßansi ¶ńßun. zajńßan u r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu nijazu Ē~ °, u kir~…ĺaŇčkir~…ĺaŇčan, sisa, paŇčaŇčan…ôn tu sjabutaj. ajzasa, paŇčaŇčan…ôn ku ¶…ô ¶jaŇčsin ¶ńßun, u tajan a tad…ômaw manamnamtu ku sjabutaj. ajzaaj a nijazu Ē~ °, izaw tusa a nijaza Ē~ °* sjawnan nijazu Ē~ ° atu Ē~ °sjabutaj nijazu Ē~ °. sjawnan nijazu Ē~ ° namakaj kawir~…ĺian nu takawsi(sa Ē~ °wa ¶), sjawnan buju Ē~ ° saamisan a zaja. zajńßan sida Ē~ ° ¶usaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč, kju izaw ku da Ē~ ° ¶usaj a di Ē~ °tu sa ku bina ¶adan, sisa, mabur~…ĺaw tajza i Ē~ °sjabutaj. Ē~ °sjabutja nanuajaw mu…ôn…ôŇč i kawanan nu takawsi(sa Ē~ °wa ¶), masasu ¶…ôkur~…ĺ tu sjawnan nijazu Ē~ ° a zaja. zajńßan mabar~…ĺad, mapr~…ĺawpus kja tukus, sisa, mabur~…ĺaw ipabaw nu katatapar~…ĺ a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. patiz…ôŇč bar~…ĺuńßajaj a nijazu Ē~ °, u ajzaaj a " ¶…ô ¶jaŇčsin ¶ńßun". : u siwkaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° i jir~…ĺan a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu Ē~ °sjabutaj. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu Ē~ °sjabutaj sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu jiŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u asip nu ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ôamw u kasabina ¶adan, tajan(tajar~…ĺ)**%, paŇč ¶ańß(amis)*%, tar~…ĺuku(truku)*%, zumazuma*%. u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) a nijazu Ē~ ° u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) a nijazu Ē~ ° kujni, katuud ku tajan(tajar~…ĺ) a tad…ômaw itini. u zuma a tad…ômaw sa u paŇč ¶ańß(amis), inaji Ē~ ° tu ku zuma a ¶id…ôkaj a tad…ômaw. u sakizaja a tad…ômaw inaji Ē~ ° ku sakizaja itini mu…ôn…ôŇč, u tajan(tajar~…ĺ) a t…ôd…ômaw amin. u ¶id…ôkaj nu tajwan jin ¶umin u nijazu Ē~ ° sa, u r~…ĺujar~…ĺuj nu tad…ômaw, pur~…ĺuŇč mu…ôŇč…ôn…ôŇč, u kabana Ē~ ° kami, ńßina u r~…ĺar~…ĺumaaj amin i nijazu Ē~ °, ¶aaj kajadańß ku ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw. sir~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, r~…ĺisin, kamu, atu kabanaan. si kar~…ĺir~…ĺidan(tumuk) sa ¶a babar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nijazu Ē~ °. i tajwan jin ¶umin, izaw ku ** ¶id…ôkaj pur~…ĺuuŇč sa *** a nijazu Ē~ °, maka ** a maŇč a tad…ômaw. satabakiaja a ¶id…ôkaj ku paŇč ¶ańß(amis), saadidi Ē~ °aj a ¶id…ôkaj ku r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa. u tabakiaja a nijazu Ē~ ° sa, ku tapar~…ĺoŇč, u nijazu Ē~ ° nu paŇč ¶ańß(amis). tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad tad…ômaw nu jin ¶umin, pur~…ĺuŇč sausi katukuńß **** a mińß ¶an * a bur~…ĺad pur~…ĺuŇč sausi (***,***), paŇč ¶ańß (***,***), tajan (**,***), pajwan (***,***), juwatan (**,***), *ukaj (**,***), pujuma (**,***), ¶ou (*,***), sajsiat (*,***), jami (*,***), saw (***), kabar~…ĺan (*,***), tar~…ĺuku (**,***), sakizaja (***), s…ôj…ôk (**,***), r~…ĺaar~…ĺuwa (***), kanakanabu (***), zuma (**,***)
